                  .fillColor($r('sys.color.ohos_id_color_primary'))
                  .backgroundColor(Color.White)

declarations.text:

                .fontWeight(FontWeight.Normal)

                .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
                .fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.9)')
